steps.title: Define the term itself
steps.content: The student wants to explain plosive phonemes. The notes define a plosive as a sound in which air flow is at first fully blocked, so the answer should define the term rather than focus on one example.

steps.title: Separate examples from definition
steps.content: A and B describe /p/ instead of directly defining plosive. C defines "fricative," which is the wrong term. The choice that states the general definition of plosive uses the relevant information most directly. The answer is D.
